name: Claude Usage Dashboard
description: Claude Code token usage dashboard for teams. Collects daily usage from local JSONL logs via Collector, stores in Supabase, and visualizes team-wide metrics with charts, tables, and CSV export.

name: AI Agent Seminar
description: A 6-week, 12-session brownbag seminar on operating AI as an agent system. Covers the adoption ladder from prompting to full AI operations, designed for all skill levels.

name: Solar System Simulator
description: Interactive 3D solar system simulator with realistic planetary orbits, textures, and camera controls. Explore the solar system in your browser.

name: Tech Blog
description: A personal tech blog covering web development, cloud architecture, and developer tooling. Written with practical examples and deep-dive tutorials.
